stt.heardError: Kpeɖeŋutɔ, nyemete ŋu se wò nya o. Taflatse gadze agbagba ake.
stt.micAccessError: Mete ŋu ge ɖe nuƒomɔ̃a me o. Kpɔ mɔɖeɖewo ɖa.

title.clickToMaximize: Zi edzi be nàkpɔe wòalolo wu
title.clickToMinimize: Zi edzi be nàɖe edzi akpɔtɔ

error.loadFailed: Do kpo avatar ƒe agba tsɔtsɔ: {{error}} .
error.passwordRequired: Nyagbe si hiã na .ania faɛl si wotsɔ nya ɣaɣlawo ŋlɔ
error.noSource: Wometsɔ avatar dzɔtsoƒe aɖeke na o (avatarUrl alo avatarData) .

greetings.0: Hi! Aleke mate ŋu akpe ɖe ŋuwò egbea?
greetings.1: Hello! Woezɔ̃! Nukae mate ŋu awɔ na wò?
greetings.2: Medo gbe na mi! Edzɔ dzi nam ŋutɔ be meƒo nu kpli wò!
greetings.3: Hello! Meva afisia be makpe ɖe ŋunye. Nukae nèhiã?
greetings.4: Alekee! Efɔ̃a? Aleke mate ŋu aɖe vi?

waiting.4: Mele ŋku lém ɖe ema ŋu na wò...
